name: Tanium
description: Integrates with Tanium Core Platform REST API v2 for real-time endpoint visibility, asset queries, threat response actions, and endpoint management

actions.name: List Endpoints
actions.description: Retrieve the list of managed endpoints (clients) registered with Tanium

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of endpoints to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

actions.name: Ask Question
actions.description: Ask a Tanium question to gather real-time data from managed endpoints

parameters.name: query_text
parameters.description: The natural language or sensor-based question to ask (e.g., 'Get Computer Name from all machines')

parameters.name: expire_seconds
parameters.description: Number of seconds before the question expires

actions.name: Get Question Results
actions.description: Retrieve the results of a previously asked Tanium question

parameters.name: question_id
parameters.description: The ID of the question to retrieve results for

actions.name: Deploy Action
actions.description: Deploy an action (package) to one or more endpoints for remediation or configuration

parameters.name: package_name
parameters.description: Name of the package to deploy

parameters.name: target_group
parameters.description: Target computer group or action group for deployment

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: JSON object of package parameters

parameters.name: expire_seconds
parameters.description: Number of seconds before the action expires

actions.name: Get Action Status
actions.description: Retrieve the status and results of a deployed action

parameters.name: action_id
parameters.description: The ID of the action to check

actions.name: Quarantine Endpoint
actions.description: Quarantine an endpoint using Tanium Threat Response to isolate it from the network

parameters.name: computer_name
parameters.description: Name of the computer to quarantine

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment describing the reason for quarantine

actions.name: Unquarantine Endpoint
actions.description: Remove quarantine from a previously isolated endpoint

parameters.name: computer_name
parameters.description: Name of the computer to unquarantine

actions.name: List Threat Response Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve alerts from Tanium Threat Response module

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by alert state (unresolved, inProgress, resolved)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity

actions.name: Search File Hash
actions.description: Search for a specific file hash across all managed endpoints using Threat Response

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Search type: md5, sha1, sha256

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The hash value to search for

actions.name: List Saved Questions
actions.description: Retrieve the list of saved questions available in Tanium

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of saved questions to return
